name: @nks-hub/webdev-console
description: Unified local development environment for Windows, macOS, and Linux — manage Apache/Nginx, PHP versions, MySQL/MariaDB, and SSL from one interface.

scripts.stage:daemon:win: dotnet publish ../daemon/NKS.WebDevConsole.Daemon/NKS.WebDevConsole.Daemon.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -o resources/daemon && npm run stage:plugins
scripts.stage:daemon:mac: dotnet publish ../daemon/NKS.WebDevConsole.Daemon/NKS.WebDevConsole.Daemon.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 --self-contained -o resources/daemon && npm run stage:plugins
scripts.stage:daemon:linux: dotnet publish ../daemon/NKS.WebDevConsole.Daemon/NKS.WebDevConsole.Daemon.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained -o resources/daemon && npm run stage:plugins
scripts.dist: npm run stage:daemon:win && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run stage:daemon:mac && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run stage:daemon:linux && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux
